data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: Wait. Before you go further, you need to know something.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: I didn't come here just to tend spirits. I was researching their origins.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: The Ather has old pathways — portals, folded into the roots of this place.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: I mapped some of them. Back on Athernyx, I was careless with that knowledge.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: The Moglins found my research. They built their own portal system from it.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: They've set up footholds in the outer zones. Camps. Crude, but they're digging in.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: I'd avoid their encampments if I were you. They aren't interested in research.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: But... if you insist on going out there anyway—

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: Here. I've been gathering these from the deeper groves. Mana seeds.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: Each one holds the essence of a different spirit. Plant it, and something will grow.

data.speaker: Gregory
data.text: Pick one. Whichever calls to you.
